consolidate-memories.prompt: Run memory consolidation. Working directory is Q:/src. Scan all sub-project memory dirs under C:/Users/qitxu/.claude/projects/Q--src*/memory/, compare against root memory at C:/Users/qitxu/.claude/projects/Q--src/memory/, copy new/updated files with ext_ prefix, remove duplicates, update MEMORY.md index (keep under 200 lines), and generate the daily HTML report to Q:/src/local_skills/session_management/memory-report-YYYYMMDD.html. Open the report in Edge when done.
consolidate-memories.description: Consolidates all sub-project memories into root, deduplicates, generates HTML report
